query:
INSERT INTO posts (title, slug, body, excerpt, pillar, readTime, published, contentType, audience_type, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES
('Where the Church Was Silent', 'where-church-was-silent', 'The church in America has a history that is not primarily the history of courage and faithfulness. It is, in significant stretches, a history of silence in the face of injustice. The silence during chattel slavery, Jim Crow, and the civil rights movement reveals a pattern of institutional self-preservation over prophetic faithfulness.', 'A reckoning with the history of silence during slavery, Jim Crow, and civil rights.', 'Prophetic Justice', '8 min', 1, 'general', 'general', NOW(), NOW()),
('Justice Is Not a Political Category', 'justice-not-political', 'The word "justice" came to be heard in many evangelical contexts as a political term. This inversion is theological error of the most significant kind. Mishpat describes God''s own character, God''s activity in history, and the specific disposition that God requires of God''s people.', 'Justice appears 400+ times in the OT. It describes God''s character and what God requires.', 'Prophetic Justice', '7 min', 1, 'general', 'general', NOW(), NOW()),
('Complicity Is Not Innocence', 'complicity-not-innocence', 'The comfortable Christian position in a culture with genuine injustice is neither endorsement nor active resistance. It is something more subtle and more convenient: the claim of non-involvement. This position presents itself as principled. It is, on examination, a specific kind of complicity.', 'Silence in the face of injustice is not neutrality. It is a specific moral choice.', 'Prophetic Justice', '8 min', 1, 'general', 'general', NOW(), NOW()),
('The Poor Are Not a Ministry Category', 'poor-not-ministry', 'The biblical position on the poor is not ambiguous. It is among the most consistently stated themes in the entire canon of Scripture. The test of genuine Christian devotion is not the quality of the worship service. It is the quality of the care for the vulnerable.', 'They are the test of the church. Matthew 25 reveals where the risen Christ is found.', 'Prophetic Justice', '7 min', 1, 'general', 'general', NOW(), NOW()),
('Creation Care Is Not Optional', 'creation-care-not-optional', 'Creation care is not an optional add-on to Christian faith but central to God''s purposes. The church that preaches about God''s creation while being indifferent to its destruction has separated theology from reality.', 'Environmental stewardship is embedded in the creation mandate and the prophetic tradition.', 'Prophetic Justice', '6 min', 1, 'general', 'general', NOW(), NOW()),
('The Widow, the Orphan, the Stranger', 'widow-orphan-stranger', 'These three categories—the widow, the orphan, the stranger—appear repeatedly throughout Scripture as the specific focus of God''s justice concern. They represent the vulnerable, the powerless, the ones without advocate or protection.', 'These three categories appear throughout Scripture as the specific focus of God''s justice concern.', 'Prophetic Justice', '7 min', 1, 'general', 'general', NOW(), NOW()),
('Mishpat and Tsedaqah', 'mishpat-tsedaqah', 'Mishpat and tsedaqah are the two Hebrew words that describe God''s justice and righteousness. Mishpat is the active work of justice. Tsedaqah is the right relationship that results from justice. Together they describe God''s character and what God requires.', 'Understanding the Hebrew words that describe God''s justice and righteousness.', 'Prophetic Justice', '6 min', 1, 'general', 'general', NOW(), NOW()),
('What Micah 6:8 Actually Demands', 'micah-6-8-demands', 'He has shown you, O mortal, what is good. And what does the LORD require of you? To act justly and to love mercy and to walk humbly with your God. This is not optional advice. It is the core requirement of following God.', '"Act justly, love mercy, walk humbly" is not optional advice but the core requirement.', 'Prophetic Justice', '7 min', 1, 'general', 'general', NOW(), NOW()),
('The Church Has a Credibility Problem', 'church-credibility-problem', 'The church known, among the people it claims to care about, for its silence when they needed its voice has sacrificed something very difficult to recover—the credibility that comes from being genuinely trustworthy in the moments that matter.', 'The cost of silence is the loss of credibility with the very people the church claims to care about.', 'Prophetic Justice', '8 min', 1, 'general', 'general', NOW(), NOW()),
('Why Racial Reconciliation Without Repentance Is Just Branding', 'racial-reconciliation-without-repentance', 'Racial reconciliation without repentance is just branding. Genuine reconciliation requires material restitution, not just spiritual apologies. The church that advocates forgiveness without engaging the question of restitution has received only half the biblical witness.', 'Genuine reconciliation requires material restitution, not just spiritual apologies.', 'Prophetic Justice', '8 min', 1, 'general', 'general', NOW(), NOW());
